prompt:
Sunlit linen sofa variation — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s curled up on an oversized linen couch in a sunlit modern bohemian living room, late morning. She rests one elbow on a fluffy linen cushion, knees tucked, soft posture. She lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between her thumb and index finger toward her parted lips with a soft warm smile, mid-bite. She wears a fitted cream knit tank top and warm-oat lounge pants, hair in a relaxed messy low bun with face-framing strands, fresh-faced light glow, no heavy makeup.

A SHAFT OF DIRECT NATURAL SUNLIGHT pours through a large window directly onto the JAR sitting on a small low wooden side-table next to the couch — the sunlight visibly hits the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan and yellow accents, the bold yellow lettering, and the curved black plastic side with a clean bright rim-light. The label is the brightest most clearly-lit element in the lower portion of the frame. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 more sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also bathed in the sunlight. A loose few cubes scattered on the wood table next to the dish. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel reading 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible, recognizable.

Background: a softly out-of-focus warm bohemian living room — a woven jute rug, a hanging woven wall hanging, a low ceramic vase with dried pampas grass, soft white wall, terra-cotta accents, sun-warmed wood floor. Tall window with sheer curtains drawn aside on the right side of the frame.

Lighting: directional warm late-morning sunlight from the right window directly on BOTH the jar AND the woman — same beam wraps both subject and product so they sit in the same light environment, integrating naturally. Color grade is warm, creamy, slightly soft, editorial wellness-brand feel (Goop / Alo / Athletic Greens).

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the woman curled on the couch, gummy held in the upper-third near her face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the side-table with sunlight directly on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture with a soft natural glow, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
